title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
